name: @wuphf/installer-stub
description: Tiny Electron hello-world packaged by electron-builder. Exists ONLY so the installer pipeline can ship a signed end-to-end artifact today, before the real desktop shell (feat/desktop-shell-skeleton) lands. Replaced as the package target once the real shell merges.

scripts.lint: biome check src/ build/*.js scripts/*.js package.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src/ build/*.js scripts/*.js package.json
scripts.format: biome format --write src/ build/*.js scripts/*.js package.json
